title: viola × sennenii
intro: Viola × sennenii is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola selkirkii, belonging to the violet family. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Viola × sennenii include potential relief from anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to improve cognitive function and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Viola × sennenii are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, and are often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
